input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.2.4
            TITLE: soldering electrical connections in the high current path is prohibited

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.2.4: Soldering electrical connections in the high current path is prohibited
EV.5.2.4 Soldering electrical connections in the high current path is prohibited 
Soldering wires to cells for the voltage monitoring input of the AMS is allowed, these wires are 
not part of the high current path.

final_answer: rule EV.5.2.4: Soldering electrical connections in the high current path is prohibited EV.5.2.4 Soldering electrical connections in the high current path is prohibited Soldering wires to cells for the voltage monitoring input of the AMS is allowed, these wires are not part of the high current path.
